title: Galaxies we can see (billions)

source.name: Galaxy count estimate comparison
source.publisher: NASA / ESA James Webb Space Telescope Science Program

notes: Illustrative; Hubble-era figure (~200 billion) reflects Gott et al. 2009 and Conselice et al. 2016 estimates. JWST-era figure (~2,000 billion / 2 trillion) reflects Conselice et al. 2016 deep-field extrapolation confirmed with JWST imaging depth.
